title: $75/day was the wrong model tax.
subtitle: The expensive part was not the API. It was letting the wrong behavior run long enough to feel normal.
valueLabel: Burn rate before the model/router correction
bullets: Switched the worker lane to DeepSeek for autonomous execution.
Kept stronger models for human-facing work only.
Turned one expensive mistake into a reusable rule.
footer: We paid for the mistake. You get the lesson.
